name: Abuja
_immutable_note: Principle II: the Genesis Chapter is sacred — never overwrite, replace, or demote. Future chapters are additions.
movement: Because There Is No Planet B
theme: From Waste to Resource: Art that Changes Perspectives
event_name: 2026 World Environment Day — Upcycling Art Workshop & Exhibition
summary: The inaugural chapter of Planet B: a five-day upcycling art masterclass and exhibition in which 15 selected artists transformed discarded materials into 61×61cm assemblages, opened on World Environment Day at Nike Art Gallery, Abuja. Sponsored by the Royal Norwegian Embassy and hosted by Nike Art Gallery, the chapter culminated in a panel discussion and the performance Òdàlè Dà'lẹ̀.

yoruba_proverbs.yoruba: Bi ilu baa baje, ti onilu lo n da
yoruba_proverbs.english: When the community falls into disrepair, its restoration lies in the hands of those who inhabit it.
He who litters the land is a betrayer of the land.
